purpose: Every release and validation lane is admitted.

register.command: bash scripts/testing/release-validate-container.sh && npm run validate:ui-test-parity && npm run validate:browser-suite-contract
register.productionRisk: Unadmitted release gate can permit false completion.
register.failureHandling: Repair and rerun before delivery or push.
register.removalConditions: Only after equal or stronger replacement proof is admitted.

register.productionRisk: Missing browser ESM dependencies can make static HTML look healthy while all interactive runtime behavior is dead.
register.whatItProves: The complete reachable browser module graph is present in the built artifact.
register.whatItDoesNotProve: It does not execute Chromium or prove user journeys.
register.failureHandling: Repair build packaging and rerun full validation.
register.removalConditions: Only after an equal or stronger import-graph/build resolver is admitted.
